bet365 @bet365 · 41s 52pts - Liverpool 51pts - 50pts - 49pts - 48pts - 47pts - Everton
Everton are 𝟵/𝟭 to finish above Liverpool for a fourth time under David Moyes. De bet365.com 1 14

William Hill @WilliamHill · 37min This is a Merseyside Derby with European football on the line for both teams!
@NicoleHolliday has picked her Bet Builder for Everton vs Liverpool.
Bet Builder Winnings Boost and Impact Sub are available.
